raw_title: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_en: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_zh: 与AI共舞：AI生成图像和视频对中国视觉新闻的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了人工智能生成的图像和视频如何影响中国的视觉新闻报道。它关注AI技术对新闻摄影、公民新闻和视觉传播带来的变化和挑战。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how AI-generated images and videos are affecting visual journalism in China. It focuses on the changes and challenges that AI technology brings to photojournalism, citizen journalism, and visual communication.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代人工智能技术对新闻生产、视觉传播和媒体伦理的影响，特别关注中国语境下的媒体转型和技术应用。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of artificial intelligence technology on news production, visual communication, and media ethics in the digital age, with particular focus on media transformation and technology application in the Chinese context.
